title: Ulcerative colitis relief for caucasians through 11 herbal essential oils
description: Plantago lanceolata essential oils have been studied for their potential benefits in managing ulcerative colitis. The key active compounds present in these oils, including alysson and alyssonol, have anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce inflammation and irritation in the digestive tract. The oils also contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant and soothing effects. This can help to calm the inflammation, reduce bleeding, and promote healing in the gut. ...
